name: Corn and Onion Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1.5 cups corn muffin mix (Jiffy), from an 8.5 oz box
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a skillet and sauté the onions until tender.
2. In a bowl, combine the sour cream, salt, parsley, and 1/2 cup of cheese.
3. Mix the corn muffin mix, egg, milk, corn, and hot sauce together well.
4. Spread the mixture into a greased 9 x 9 inch pan.
5. Pour the sour cream mixture over the top of the corn mixture.
6. Sprinkle the remaining shredded Cheddar cheese on top.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 425°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
